subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from Our presence unto him who was named Muhammad-before-'Alí, that he may bear witness within his own being to that which God hath testified ere creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من سمی بمحمد قبل علی لیشهد فی ذاته بما شهد الله قبل خلق
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
